name: property managers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 invoices/month, discrepancies cause overcharges. We reconcile utility data with invoices instead of manual reconciliation.
problem_solved: Discrepancies between utility consumption data and billing invoices.
features: manual data entry for utility consumption

locked_fields.current_alternative: manual reconciliation of invoices and utility data
must_have_features: manual data entry for utility consumption

one_liner: For property managers processing 5–15 invoices/month, discrepancies cause overcharges. We reconcile utility data with invoices instead of manual reconciliation.
